channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Attacks from residents complicate the fight against a rare type of Ebola
item.description: Three times in the past week, healthcare facilities have been attacked. On Sunday, angry young men stormed a hospital treating Ebola patients, forcing medical staff to evacuate them as gunfire rang out.
item.content:encoded:
Three times in the past week, healthcare facilities have been attacked. On Sunday, angry young men stormed a hospital treating Ebola patients, forcing medical staff to evacuate them as gunfire rang out.

(Image credit: Moses Sawasawa)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: New York back in NBA Finals for first time since 1999 after beating Cleveland
item.description: New York will play the defending champion Oklahoma City Thunder or San Antonio Spurs in the finals. The Western Conference finals is tied at two games apiece with Game 5 to be played on Tuesday.
item.content:encoded:
New York will play the defending champion Oklahoma City Thunder or San Antonio Spurs in the finals. The Western Conference finals is tied at two games apiece with Game 5 to be played on Tuesday.

(Image credit: Sue Ogrocki)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Ahead of the World Cup, pressure to win and grow American soccer is on Tim Ream's mind
item.description: Hoping to make the roster for the U.S. Men's National team going to the World Cup, Tim Ream knows there's a lot riding on the tournament, from playing well to growing a new generation of fans at home.
item.content:encoded:
Hoping to make the roster for the U.S. Men's National team going to the World Cup, Tim Ream knows there's a lot riding on the tournament, from playing well to growing a new generation of fans at home.

(Image credit: Courtesy of Charlotte FC)
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Pierre

item.title: After Stephen Colbert's viral talk show parody, CBS backs down from copyright action
item.description: CBS and Paramount backed away from copyright challenges to limit distribution of Stephen Colbert's appearance on a Michigan cable access show. He ended his run as host of "The Late Show" on Thursday.
item.content:encoded:
CBS and Paramount backed away from copyright challenges to limit distribution of Stephen Colbert's appearance on a Michigan cable access show. He ended his run as host of "The Late Show" on Thursday.

(Image credit: Evan Agostini/Evan Agostini/Invision/AP)
item.dc:creator: Brian Mann

item.title: Trump to get 'routine annual' medical exam 7 months after last visit to Walter Reed
item.description: White House boasts Trump's "excellent health" as questions loom over the medical reality of the oldest inaugurated president.
item.content:encoded:
White House boasts Trump's "excellent health" as questions loom over the medical reality of the oldest inaugurated president.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett

item.title: Trump says U.S. and Iran nearing a peace deal. And, Pope Leo weighs in on AI's rise
item.description: President Trump says that a deal with Iran to end the war is largely negotiated. And, Pope Leo XIV weighed in today on the rise of AI during his first encyclical.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump says that a deal with Iran to end the war is largely negotiated. And, Pope Leo XIV weighed in today on the rise of AI during his first encyclical.

(Image credit: Brendan Smialowski)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: U.S. military strikes Iran as Trump says negotiations move forward for deal to end war
item.description: The U.S. military announced strikes against Iranian positions just hours after President Trump says more countries should normalize ties with Israel in any Iran deal, tempering expectations of peace.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. military announced strikes against Iranian positions just hours after President Trump says more countries should normalize ties with Israel in any Iran deal, tempering expectations of peace.

(Image credit: Vahid Salemi)
item.dc:creator: Jane Arraf

item.title: In Beirut, refugee girls and women learn more than self-defense in martial arts class
item.description: In the male-dominated world of Palestinian refugee camps in Lebanon, a martial arts teacher offers women a way to empowerment.
item.content:encoded:
In the male-dominated world of Palestinian refugee camps in Lebanon, a martial arts teacher offers women a way to empowerment.

(Image credit: Aline Deschamps for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Jane Arraf

item.title: Pope Leo takes aim at big tech in sweeping encyclical on AI
item.description: "Magnifica Humanitas" tackles the social, economic and political challenges associated with artificial intelligence.
item.content:encoded:
"Magnifica Humanitas" tackles the social, economic and political challenges associated with artificial intelligence.

(Image credit: Alessandra Tarantino)
item.dc:creator: Claire Giangrave

item.title: 'My body carried me,' Elizabeth Smart says. Now she's celebrating it
item.description: Her abduction at age 14 drew international attention. After her rescue, Smart says she struggled with feeling shame around her body. Bodybuilding has helped her see herself differently.
item.content:encoded:
Her abduction at age 14 drew international attention. After her rescue, Smart says she struggled with feeling shame around her body. Bodybuilding has helped her see herself differently.

(Image credit: Kim Raff for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Windsor Johnston
